Reasoning: All agents agree the location is in North America, specifically a temperate deciduous forest. The Landscape Agent provides the strongest differentiator, noting that the density and variety of the lush undergrowth are more characteristic of the humid subtropical climate of the Eastern US (Mid-Atlantic/Appalachian regions) than the cooler forests of Southern Canada.
